normalization.notes: Store Deseret text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep case pairs intact and avoid automatic English-to-Deseret conversion without reviewed transcription rules.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Deseret letters, case pairs, phonemic vowel contrasts, consonants, and word chunks
segmentation.notes: Deseret encodes English phonemes and has case. Shipped anchors need a chosen pronunciation model and reviewed spelling.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Deseret code point metadata and letter names. Use as infrastructure metadata only.
Rendering and fallback test source. Not a text corpus.

sources.license: terms require review before derived use
sources.notes: Discovery source for history and encoding rationale. Do not copy examples into shipped content without review.

sources.license: MIT package license; upstream corpus licenses require review
sources.notes: Useful for English anchor utility only. Deseret spellings must be app-authored and reviewed.
Short phonemic examples authored by Glyphin and reviewed against the chosen Deseret transcription policy.
